description: Extracts triangle parameters from user query and generates structured function call for calculate_triangle_area

inputs.name: user_input
inputs.description: The raw user query text containing triangle base, height, and potentially unit information that needs to be parsed

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: The JSON specification of available functions that can be called, used for parameter validation

output.description: Returns a structured function call object with the function name as the top-level key and parameters as nested values. Example structure: {"calculate_triangle_area": {"base": 10, "height": 5, "unit": "units"}}. The function name becomes the key and all parameters are nested within that key's object value.

workflow_spec.name: Triangle Area Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parses user query to extract triangle parameters and generates appropriate function call for calculating triangle area
